The '''glowing nectar''', also called the '''glowing liquid''', was a [[Nectar/Legends|nectar]] produced by [[sunnydew flower]]s. Most of it was stolen by [[Gantu]], who used it to light his cave. The absence of the nectar from the flowers killed most of them, making the native [[Zandor Rocker]]s hate Gantu.<ref name="Ewoks 1" />

{{Substance-stub}}
